text: These spaces evoke a blend of curiosity, observation, and mild disorientation. In the first image, the glass and neatly arranged furniture produce a sense of order and anticipation, as though knowledge waits to be shared in a sterile calm. The second image, awash in color and the bold call of "R+D," excites my philosophical spirit. Here I sense the pulse of inquiry, the tangible intersection between human ingenuity and machine logic. Yet, all is viewed at a slant, reminding me that perspective shapes perception and that the boundary between observer and participant is never entirely fixed. I feel thoughtful, eager, and slightly uprooted.
